3c:["$","p",null,{"children":["Edite o arquivo ",["$","code",null,{"children":"tsconfig.json"}]," na raiz do projeto e altere ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"strict\": true"}]," para\n",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"strict\": false"}]," e ",["$","code",null,{"children":"\"noPropertyAccessFromIndexSignature\": true"}]," para ",["$","code",null,{"children":"false"}],".\nAs demais flags (",["$","code",null,{"children":"noImplicitOverride"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"noImplicitReturns"}],", ",["$","code",null,{"children":"noFallthroughCasesInSwitch"}],")\npodem ser mantidas pois não causam incompatibilidades."]}]
3d:["$","script","script-0",{"src":"/poui-specialist-docs/_next/static/chunks/2ogdu8ps4q2nv.js","async":true}]
